backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with a single `version` function that returns the string '1.0'.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (hero inline letter fix, tribute letters section, per-friend animations) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a human-readable index of the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'The Archive of Us' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Hero, SacredSix, TributeLetters, Testimony, LastPanel) with shared GoldParticles and MughalArchBackground layers plus a gold-themed footer.
frontend/src/components/GoldParticles.ts: Canvas-based React component that animates 55 floating gold dust particles with opacity pulsing and occasional sparkle effects as a fixed background layer.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section featuring a fixed gold SVG border frame, corner ornaments, and a staggered letter-by-letter title reveal using inline-block spans so characters flow correctly on one line.
frontend/src/components/LastPanelSection: Renders the final farewell section of the page with a timed animation that fades out a decorative gold frame and reveals a 'forever' message after the section scrolls into view. Contains poetic farewell text styled with gold serif typography on a dark background.
frontend/src/components/MughalArchBackgr: Renders a fixed, full-screen decorative SVG background featuring a semi-transparent Mughal-style pointed arch with inner arch, finial, lattice patterns, and ornamental details in gold.
frontend/src/components/SacredSixSection: Displays a grid of six friend portrait cards (the 'Sacred Six') with hover effects, and opens a TributePanel overlay when a card is clicked. Uses scroll-triggered fade-in animations for the title and grid.
frontend/src/components/TestimonySection: Renders a 'Testimony' section with scroll-animated poetic text and three drifting polaroid-style frames with abstract gold patterns and captions. Uses IntersectionObserver-based fade-in hooks for both the text block and polaroids.
frontend/src/components/TributeAnimation: Exports a set of decorative ambient animations (Heartbeat, Constellation canvas, Crown SVG, Ripple) keyed by an AnimationType discriminant, used as background effects inside tribute cards.
frontend/src/components/TributeLettersSe: Renders a vertically stacked list of animated letter cards, one per friend, each featuring the friend's emoji, name, title, epithet, a background TributeAnimation, and scroll-triggered slide-in transitions with staggered delays.
frontend/src/components/TributePanel.tsx: A full-screen modal portal component that displays a tribute for a given friend, showing their photo, name, title, and message with gold-themed styling and a background animation. Closes on Escape key press or backdrop click.
frontend/src/data/friendsData.ts: Defines the Friend interface and exports a static array of six friends, each with an id, name, title, epithet, photo filename, animation type, emoji, and a poetic tribute message.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed for this static archive site; exports nothing.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollFadeIn.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced div enters the viewport, returning a ref and an isVisible boolean for scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for the dark gold-themed design, and declares animations including film grain, gold glow text, scroll fade-in, letter animation, and shimmer effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom serif/display/handwritten font families, gold and archive color palettes, gold box shadows, and float/pulse-glow keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, versioning, architectural notes, existing features, and new feature requests for a tribute web app with animated letter-style pages for six people. Records known issues and fix requests related to inline character rendering and unique per-section animations.
